provisions.title: Declaration on Prohibition of Use of Voice Over Internet_951230
provisions.content:
KINGDOM OF CAMBODIA

 NATION RELIGION KING
 Ministry of Posts and Telecommunications Phnom Penh: 30 December

 1998

 N? : 015 PT PrK

 Declaration

 On

 Prohibition of Use of Voice Over Internet

 Minister of Posts and Telecommunication having seen:

 The constitution of the Kingdom of Cambodia
 The decree No NS/RKM/0496/20 Dated 24 January 1996 on the formation of the Ministry of Posts

 and Telecommunications.

 The sub decree No 05 ANRK date 05 March 1987 issued by the Council of Ministers on post and

 telecommunication services.

 DECIDES
1. Any use of telephony via Internet or any business which offers telephony service via Internet is strictly
 prohibited. Any person who violates the above shall be penalised according to the law.
2. This declaration comes into effect on the date signed.

 Copy to for Minister

 – Council of Ministers Secretary of State

 – Camnet [ Signed ]

 – Big Pond Phan Phin

 – File
